Member.name: mesh_rni_cfg_ctl
Member.help: Set RN-I config control value(chip_id field will be ignored)

Member.name: mesh_rnd_cfg_ctl
Member.help: Set RN-D config control value(chip_id field will be ignored)e

Knob.name: mesh_d2d_override
Knob.help: Enable and Use the Mesh D2D Knobs listed

Knob.name: cmn_sam_config
Knob.help: Select Mesh config

Knob.name: cmn_cxl_interleave
Knob.help: Selct CXL intearleave value 0,3 or 4

Knob.name: cmn_cxl_device_interleave_size
Knob.help: This field controls the interleave size across all aggregated CXSA/CXLSA Devices 4'h0: 64B Interleaved 4'h1: 128B Interleaved 4'h2: 256B Interleaved 4'h3: 512B Interleaved 4'h4: 1KB Interleaved 4'h5: 2KB Interleaved 4'h6: 4KB Interleaved 4'h7: 8KB Interleaved 4'h8: 16KB

Knob.name: cmn_uma_arsm_htg_wa_disabled
Knob.help: Set value for UMA ARSM HTG CFG

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cbusy_limit_ctl
Knob.help: Cbusy threshold limits for POCQ entries

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cbusy_resp_ctl
Knob.help: Contols the responses sent from HNS to RNF

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cbusy_sn_ctl
Knob.help: Controls the SN-F cbusy thresholds.

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cbusy_write_limit_ctl
Knob.help: Cbusy threshold limits for POCQ write entries.

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cbusy_mode_ctl
Knob.help: Control register for additional CBusy controls

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_aux_ctl
Knob.help: Auxiliary control register for HNF. Default val 0x2000_0010_0020_0002

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_r2_aux_ctl
Knob.help: Set value for por_hnf_aux_ctl_1

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_cfg_ctl
Knob.help: Set value for por_hnf_cfg_ctl

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_lbt_cfg_ctl
Knob.help: Functions as the configuration control register for HN-F. Only applicable to LBT transactions

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_lbt_aux_ctl
Knob.help: Functions as the auxiliary control register for HN-F. Only applicable to LBT transactions

Knob.name: mesh_hnf_lbt_cbusy_ctl
Knob.help: Controls the CBusy response for LCN Bound Transactions

Knob.name: mesh_hni_cfg_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set HN-I Config CTL value

Knob.name: mesh_hni_aux_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set HN-I AUX ctl value

Knob.name: mesh_hnt_dn_domain_cxra
Knob.help: Set value for cxra per HNT (There are 4 HNTs)

Knob.name: mesh_rni_cfg_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set RN-I config control value(chip_id field will be ignored)

Knob.name: mesh_rni_aux_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set RN-I auxiliary control value

Knob.name: mesh_rnd_cfg_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set RN-D config control value(chip_id field will be ignored)

Knob.name: mesh_rnd_aux_ctl_knob
Knob.help: Set RN-D auxiliary control value

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Error_Detection_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable Mesh RAS Error Detection in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: false.

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Error_Deferment_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable Mesh RAS Error Deferment in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: false.

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Uncorrected_Error_Int_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable Mesh RAS Uncorrected Error Interrupt in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: false.

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Fault_Handling_Int_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable Mesh RAS Fault Handling Interrupt in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: false.

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Corrected_Error_Int_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable Mesh RAS Corrected Error Interrupt in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: true.

Knob.name: mesh_RAS_Parity_Error_Disable
Knob.help: If true, disable External Logging Parity Errors in the Mesh RAS Control registers. Default: false.

Knob.name: por_ccg_ha_aux_ctl
Knob.help: CCG HA aux control

Knob.name: por_ccg_ha_cfg_ctl
Knob.help: CCG HA config control

Knob.name: por_ccg_ha_cxprtcl_link0_ctl
Knob.help: CCG HA config control 1

Knob.name: por_ccg_ra_cfg_ctl
Knob.help: CCG RA config control

Knob.name: por_ccg_ra_aux_ctl
Knob.help: CCG RA aux control

Knob.name: por_ccg_ra_ccprtcl_link0_ctl
Knob.help: CCG RA config control 1

Knob.name: por_ccg_ra_cbusy_limit_ctl
Knob.help: CCG RA config control 2

Knob.name: por_ccla_aux_ctl
Knob.help: CCLA aux control

Knob.name: d2d_pll_divder
Knob.help: txdiv field in d2dConfig2

Knob.name: d2d_ref_divder
Knob.help: Reference clock value(1-15)

Knob.name: d2d_pll_fb_devider
Knob.help: feedback clock devide value (1-127)

Knob.name: d2d_ecc_cfg
Knob.help: Configure Bit 9 and 10 of D2D Config to enable or disable RX/TX ECC

Knob.name: d2d_tx_interface_clk_alignment
Knob.help: run calibration to center TX interface

Knob.name: d2d_ras_enable
Knob.help: Enable RAS

Knob.name: d2d_sleep_cfg
Knob.help: Sleep configuration 1: enable 0:disable

Knob.name: d2d_sleep_cfg_entry
Knob.help: Sleep configuration entry: Idle entry time, Number of clock cycle the channel must be Idle
